summary: Health readiness score web application with bilingual (English/Hindi) content, premium beige and sage green design system, medical history tracking, and strict content management requirements
architectural_notes: Content Management: Strict content lock policy - exact text must be preserved without auto-improvements or translations
Design System: Premium minimal UI with beige background, green header (#739B6E), and very light sage green (#EBF3ED) accent cards
Bilingual Support: English and Hindi content throughout the application
Basic Information Page: Main hero/welcome card at top with health readiness score content

existing_features.title: Replace the main Hero/Welcome card text at the top of the Basic Information page with the exact provided content. Title: 'Get Your Health Readiness Score'. Subtitle: 'जानें अपना हेल्थ रेडीनेस स्कोर'. Description: 'Difference Between Current Habits & Optimal Health Lifestyle. Discover The Current Condition of Your Body & Understand What kind of Care, Correction & Routine Adjustment it Needs — and when.' Hindi Description: 'आपकी आज की आदतों और आपकी सबसे बेहतरीन सेहत के बीच का फासला.' Benefits list: '1. You'll Get to Know Your Health More Closely & Find Out How Ready You are for a Change. 2. Through Guided Questions, You will Recognize what Healthy Habits You are Missing. 3. You will Identify Small Daily Routine Mistakes that may be Creating Long-Term Health Problems.' Preserve all structural UI elements, form fields, toggles, and buttons on the page.

Change the Medical History card background color to a very light pale mint/sage green (#EBF3ED). Keep the card's current position, layout, and all existing styling exactly the same. Ensure text remains highly readable with premium appearance.

projectName: Update Hero Card Content and Fix Medical History Background Color
